title: sideritis microchlamys
intro: Sideritis microchlamys is a species of flowering plant in the genus Sideritis, commonly known as the mountain tea or ironwort plant. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and chronic coughs. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reduced oxidative stress, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. Sideritis microchlamys is typically consumed as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with herbal preparations often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
